name: the-forge
description: The Forge — a self-hosted, single-user habit tracker that turns your goals into an RPG (XP, levels, attributes, quests, streaks, weekly boss).

scripts.test: node test/engine-regression.js && node test/auth-setup.js && node test/api-validation.js && node test/backup-restore.js
scripts.check:syntax: node --check server.js && node --check send-reminders.js && node --check public/app.js && node --check public/extras.js && node --check public/fx.js && node --check public/game.js && node --check public/login.js && node --check public/modules.js && node --check public/setup.js && node --check public/sw.js && node --check test/engine-regression.js && node --check test/auth-setup.js && node --check test/api-validation.js && node --check test/backup-restore.js
